[package]
name = "const-field-offset"
version = "0.1.5"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Wrapper around field-offset crate and const-field-offset-macro"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"

[features]
field-offset-trait = ["const-field-offset-macro/field-offset-trait"]

[dependencies]
field-offset = "0.3.2"

[dependencies.const-field-offset-macro]
version = "=0.1.5"
path = "./macro"

[dev-dependencies]
memoffset = "0.9.0"

[package]
name = "const-field-offset-macro"
version = "0.1.5"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "Procedural macro to generate constant field offset from repr(c) struct"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"

[lib]
path = "macro.rs"
proc-macro = true

[features]
field-offset-trait = []

[dependencies]
quote = "1.0"
proc-macro2 = "1.0"

[dependencies.syn]
version = "2.0"
features = ["derive"]

[dev-dependencies]
memoffset = "0.9.0"

[dev-dependencies.const-field-offset]
path = ".."
features = ["field-offset-trait"]

[package]
name = "gst-plugin-reqwest"
version = "0.14.4"
authors = ["Sebastian Dröge <sebastian@centricular.com>"]
repository = "https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gst-plugins-rs"
license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
description = "GStreamer reqwest HTTP Source Plugin"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.83"

[package.metadata.capi]
min_version = "0.9.21"

[package.metadata.capi.header]
enabled = false

[package.metadata.capi.library]
install_subdir = "gstreamer-1.0"
versioning = false
import_library = false

[package.metadata.capi.pkg_config]
requires_private = "gstreamer-1.0, gstreamer-base-1.0, gobject-2.0, glib-2.0, gmodule-2.0"

[package.metadata.gstreamer]
release_date = "2025-07-16"

[dependencies]
url = "2.1"
futures = "0.3"
headers = "0.4"
mime = "0.3"

[dependencies.gst]
package = "gstreamer"
version = "0.24"

[dependencies.gst-base]
package = "gstreamer-base"
version = "0.24"

[dependencies.tokio]
version = "1.0"
default-features = false
features = ["time", "rt-multi-thread"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.rustls]
version = "0.23"
default-features = false
features = ["prefer-post-quantum", "tls12", "std", "ring"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.13"
default-features = false
features = ["charset", "http2", "system-proxy", "cookies", "gzip", "default-tls"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.13"
default-features = false
features = ["native-tls", "charset", "http2", "system-proxy", "cookies", "gzip"]

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"macos\", target_os = \"windows\"))".dependencies.reqwest]
version = "0.13"
features = ["native-tls", "cookies", "gzip"]

[dev-dependencies]
http-body-util = "0.1.1"
bytes = "1.0"
pin-project-lite = "0.2"

[dev-dependencies.hyper]
version = "1.0"
features = ["server"]

[dev-dependencies.gst]
package = "gstreamer"
version = "0.24"

[lib]
name = "gstreqwest"
crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
path = "src/lib.rs"

[build-dependencies.gst-plugin-version-helper]
path = "./version-helper"
version = "0.8"

[features]
static = []
capi = []
doc = ["gst/v1_18"]

[package]
name = "gst-plugin-version-helper"
version = "0.8.3"
authors = ["Sajeer Ahamed <ahamedsajeer.15.15@cse.mrt.ac.lk>", "Sebastian Dröge <sebastian@centricular.com>"]
categories = ["development-tools"]
description = "build.rs helper function for GStreamer plugin metadata"
repository = "https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/gstreamer/gst-plugins-rs"
license = "MIT"
homepage = "https://gstreamer.freedesktop.org"
keywords = ["gstreamer", "multimedia", "cargo"]
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.69"

[package.metadata.gstreamer]
release_date = "2025-07-16"

[dependencies.chrono]
version = "0.4.23"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "clock"]

[dependencies.toml_edit]
version = "0.24"
default-features = false
features = ["parse"]

[package]
name = "i-slint-backend-android-activity"
description = "OpenGL rendering backend for Slint"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"
license = "GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Slint-Royalty-free-2.0 OR LicenseRef-Slint-Software-3.0"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
rust-version = "1.88"
version = "1.15.1"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
targets = ["aarch64-linux-android", "armv7-linux-androideabi", "i686-linux-android", "x86_64-linux-android"]
features = ["native-activity", "aa-06"]
rustdoc-args = ["--generate-link-to-definition"]

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
game-activity = ["android-activity-06?/game-activity", "android-activity-05?/game-activity"]
native-activity = ["android-activity-06?/native-activity", "android-activity-05?/native-activity"]
aa-06 = ["android-activity-06", "ndk-09"]
aa-05 = ["android-activity-05", "ndk-08"]
unstable-wgpu-27 = ["i-slint-renderer-skia/unstable-wgpu-27"]
unstable-wgpu-28 = ["i-slint-renderer-skia/unstable-wgpu-28"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.i-slint-renderer-skia]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/skia"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.i-slint-core]
features = ["std"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.raw-window-handle]
version = "0.6"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.android-activity-05]
package = "android-activity"
version = "0.5"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.android-activity-06]
package = "android-activity"
version = "0.6"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.jni]
version = "0.21"
features = ["invocation"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.ndk-08]
package = "ndk"
version = "0.8.0"
optional = true
features = ["rwh_06"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.ndk-09]
package = "ndk"
version = "0.9.0"
optional = true
features = ["rwh_06"]
default-features = false

[build-dependencies]
android-build = "0.1.2"

[package]
name = "i-slint-backend-linuxkms"
description = "OpenGL rendering backend for Slint"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"
license = "GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Slint-Royalty-free-2.0 OR LicenseRef-Slint-Software-3.0"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
rust-version = "1.88"
version = "1.15.1"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
rustdoc-args = ["--generate-link-to-definition"]

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
renderer-skia = ["renderer-skia-opengl"]
renderer-skia-vulkan = ["i-slint-renderer-skia/vulkan", "vulkano", "drm", "dep:memmap2"]
renderer-skia-opengl = ["i-slint-renderer-skia/opengl", "drm", "gbm", "glutin", "raw-window-handle", "dep:memmap2"]
renderer-femtovg = ["i-slint-renderer-femtovg/opengl", "drm", "gbm", "glutin", "raw-window-handle"]
renderer-software = ["i-slint-renderer-software/std", "drm", "dep:bytemuck", "dep:memmap2"]
libseat = ["dep:libseat"]
default = []

[dependencies.i-slint-core]
features = ["default", "image-decoders", "svg"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-common]
features = ["default"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/common"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-renderer-skia]
features = ["default", "kms"]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/skia"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-renderer-femtovg]
features = ["default"]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/femtovg"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-renderer-software]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/software"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.input]
default-features = false
version = "0.9.0"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.xkbcommon]
version = "0.9.0"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.calloop]
version = "0.14.1"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.libseat]
version = "0.2.1"
optional = true
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.nix]
version = "0.30.1"
features = ["fs", "ioctl"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.vulkano]
version = "0.35.0"
optional = true
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.drm]
version = "0.14.0"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.gbm]
version = "0.18.0"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["drm-support"]

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.glutin]
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["libloading", "egl"]
version = "0.32.0"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.raw-window-handle]
version = "0.6.2"
optional = true

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.bytemuck]
optional = true
features = ["derive"]
version = "1.13.1"

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.memmap2]
version = "0.9.4"
optional = true

[package]
name = "i-slint-backend-qt"
description = "Qt rendering backend for Slint"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"
license = "GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Slint-Royalty-free-2.0 OR LicenseRef-Slint-Software-3.0"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
rust-version = "1.88"
version = "1.15.1"
links = "i_slint_backend_qt"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
rustdoc-args = ["--generate-link-to-definition"]

[features]
rtti = ["i-slint-core/rtti"]
default = ["enable"]
enable = ["dep:cpp", "dep:lyon_path", "dep:pin-project", "dep:pin-weak", "dep:qttypes", "dep:cpp_build"]

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[dependencies.i-slint-common]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/common"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-core-macros]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core-macros"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-core]
features = ["std", "shared-parley"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core"
default-features = false

[dependencies.const-field-offset]
version = "0.1"
path = "../../../helper_crates/const-field-offset"

[dependencies.vtable]
version = "0.3"
path = "helper_crates/vtable"

[dependencies.cpp]
version = "0.5.5"
optional = true

[dependencies.lyon_path]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.pin-project]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.pin-weak]
version = "1"
optional = true

[dependencies.qttypes]
version = "0.2.7"
default-features = false
optional = true

[build-dependencies.cpp_build]
version = "0.5.5"
optional = true

[package]
name = "i-slint-backend-selector"
description = "Helper crate to pick the default rendering backend for Slint"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"
license = "GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Slint-Royalty-free-2.0 OR LicenseRef-Slint-Software-3.0"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
rust-version = "1.88"
version = "1.15.1"
build = "build.rs"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
rustdoc-args = ["--generate-link-to-definition"]

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
backend-winit = ["backend-winit-x11", "backend-winit-wayland"]
backend-winit-x11 = ["i-slint-backend-winit/x11"]
backend-winit-wayland = ["i-slint-backend-winit/wayland"]
backend-linuxkms = ["i-slint-backend-linuxkms/libseat"]
backend-linuxkms-noseat = ["i-slint-backend-linuxkms"]
backend-qt = ["i-slint-backend-qt/enable"]
backend-testing = ["i-slint-backend-testing/internal"]
renderer-femtovg = ["dep:i-slint-renderer-femtovg", "i-slint-backend-winit?/renderer-femtovg", "i-slint-backend-linuxkms?/renderer-femtovg"]
renderer-femtovg-wgpu = ["i-slint-renderer-femtovg/wgpu", "i-slint-backend-winit?/renderer-femtovg-wgpu"]
renderer-skia = ["i-slint-backend-winit?/renderer-skia", "i-slint-backend-linuxkms?/renderer-skia"]
renderer-skia-opengl = ["i-slint-backend-winit?/renderer-skia-opengl", "i-slint-backend-linuxkms?/renderer-skia-opengl", "i-slint-renderer-skia/opengl"]
renderer-skia-vulkan = ["i-slint-backend-winit?/renderer-skia-vulkan", "i-slint-backend-linuxkms?/renderer-skia-vulkan", "i-slint-renderer-skia/vulkan"]
renderer-software = ["i-slint-backend-winit?/renderer-software", "i-slint-backend-linuxkms?/renderer-software"]
rtti = ["i-slint-core/rtti", "i-slint-backend-qt?/rtti"]
accessibility = ["i-slint-backend-winit?/accessibility"]
raw-window-handle-06 = ["i-slint-core/raw-window-handle-06", "i-slint-backend-winit?/raw-window-handle-06"]
system-testing = ["i-slint-backend-testing/system-testing"]
unstable-wgpu-27 = ["i-slint-core/unstable-wgpu-27", "i-slint-renderer-skia?/unstable-wgpu-27", "i-slint-renderer-femtovg?/unstable-wgpu-27", "i-slint-backend-winit?/unstable-wgpu-27"]
unstable-wgpu-28 = ["i-slint-core/unstable-wgpu-28", "i-slint-renderer-skia?/unstable-wgpu-28", "i-slint-renderer-femtovg?/unstable-wgpu-28", "i-slint-backend-winit?/unstable-wgpu-28"]
unstable-winit-030 = ["i-slint-backend-winit"]
unstable-libinput-09 = ["dep:input"]
backend-android-activity = ["dep:i-slint-backend-android-activity"]
default = ["i-slint-backend-qt", "backend-winit"]

[dependencies]
cfg-if = "1"

[dependencies.i-slint-core]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-backend-testing]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/backends/testing"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-core-macros]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core-macros"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"android\"))".dependencies.i-slint-backend-winit]
features = ["default", "muda"]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/backends/winit"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"android\"))".dependencies.i-slint-renderer-skia]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/skia"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"android\"))".dependencies.i-slint-renderer-femtovg]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/femtovg"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"android\")".dependencies.i-slint-backend-android-activity]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/backends/android-activity"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(not(target_os = \"wasm\"))".dependencies.i-slint-backend-qt]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/backends/qt"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.i-slint-backend-linuxkms]
features = ["default"]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/backends/linuxkms"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_os = \"linux\")".dependencies.input]
optional = true
version = "0.9.0"
default-features = false

[build-dependencies.i-slint-common]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/common"
default-features = false

[dev-dependencies.slint]
path = "../../../api/rs/slint"
default-features = false
features = ["std", "compat-1-2", "backend-winit", "renderer-software", "unstable-winit-030"]

[package]
name = "i-slint-backend-winit"
description = "Winit backend for Slint"
authors = ["Slint Developers <info@slint.dev>"]
edition = "2024"
homepage = "https://slint.dev"
license = "GPL-3.0-only OR LicenseRef-Slint-Royalty-free-2.0 OR LicenseRef-Slint-Software-3.0"
repository = "https://github.com/slint-ui/slint"
rust-version = "1.88"
version = "1.15.1"
build = "build.rs"

[package.metadata.docs.rs]
features = ["wayland", "renderer-software", "raw-window-handle-06"]
rustdoc-args = ["--generate-link-to-definition"]

[lib]
path = "lib.rs"

[features]
wayland = ["winit/wayland", "winit/wayland-csd-adwaita", "glutin?/wayland", "glutin-winit?/wayland", "copypasta/wayland", "i-slint-renderer-skia?/wayland", "softbuffer?/wayland", "softbuffer?/wayland-dlopen"]
x11 = ["winit/x11", "glutin?/x11", "glutin?/glx", "glutin-winit?/x11", "glutin-winit?/glx", "copypasta/x11", "i-slint-renderer-skia?/x11", "softbuffer?/x11", "softbuffer?/x11-dlopen"]
renderer-femtovg = ["i-slint-renderer-femtovg/opengl", "dep:glutin", "dep:glutin-winit"]
renderer-femtovg-wgpu = ["i-slint-renderer-femtovg/wgpu", "dep:i-slint-renderer-femtovg", "unstable-wgpu-28"]
renderer-skia = ["i-slint-renderer-skia"]
renderer-skia-opengl = ["renderer-skia", "i-slint-renderer-skia/opengl"]
renderer-skia-vulkan = ["renderer-skia", "i-slint-renderer-skia/vulkan"]
renderer-software = ["dep:softbuffer", "dep:imgref", "dep:rgb", "dep:i-slint-renderer-software", "i-slint-renderer-software/std", "dep:bytemuck"]
accessibility = ["dep:accesskit", "dep:accesskit_winit"]
raw-window-handle-06 = ["i-slint-core/raw-window-handle-06"]
unstable-wgpu-27 = ["i-slint-core/unstable-wgpu-27", "i-slint-renderer-skia?/unstable-wgpu-27"]
unstable-wgpu-28 = ["i-slint-core/unstable-wgpu-28", "i-slint-renderer-femtovg?/unstable-wgpu-28", "i-slint-renderer-skia?/unstable-wgpu-28"]
default = []

[dependencies]
cfg-if = "1"
lyon_path = "1.0"
pin-weak = "1"
scoped-tls-hkt = "0.1"

[dependencies.i-slint-core]
features = ["default"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-core-macros]
features = ["default"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/core-macros"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-common]
features = ["default"]
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/common"
default-features = false

[dependencies.derive_more]
version = "2.0.0"
default-features = false
features = ["deref", "deref_mut", "into", "from", "add", "add_assign", "mul", "not", "display"]

[dependencies.strum]
version = "0.27.1"
default-features = false
features = ["derive"]

[dependencies.winit]
version = "0.30.2"
default-features = false
features = ["rwh_06"]

[dependencies.raw-window-handle]
version = "0.6"
features = ["alloc"]

[dependencies.scopeguard]
version = "1.1.0"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-renderer-femtovg]
features = ["default"]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/femtovg"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-renderer-skia]
features = ["default"]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/skia"
default-features = false

[dependencies.i-slint-renderer-software]
optional = true
version = "=1.15.1"
path = "internal/renderers/software"
default-features = false

[dependencies.softbuffer]
optional = true
default-features = false
version = "0.4.4"

[dependencies.imgref]
version = "1.6.1"
optional = true

[dependencies.rgb]
version = "0.8.27"
optional = true

[dependencies.bytemuck]
optional = true
features = ["derive"]
version = "1.13.1"

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"macos\", target_family = \"windows\"))".dependencies.muda]
version = "0.17.0"
optional = true
default-features = false

[target."cfg(any(target_os = \"macos\", target_family = \"windows\"))".dependencies.vtable]
version = "0.3"
path = "helper_crates/vtable"

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.web-sys]
features = ["HtmlInputElement", "HtmlCanvasElement", "Window", "Document", "Event", "KeyboardEvent", "InputEvent", "CompositionEvent", "DomStringMap", "ClipboardEvent", "DataTransfer", "WebGlContextEvent"]
version = "0.3.72"
default-features = false

[target."cfg(target_arch = \"wasm32\")".dependencies.wasm-bindgen]
version = "0.2"

[target."cfg(all(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"), not(all(target_vendor = \"apple\", not(target_os = \"macos\")))))".dependencies.glutin]
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["egl", "wgl"]
version = "0.32.0"

[target."cfg(all(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"), not(all(target_vendor = \"apple\", not(target_os = \"macos\")))))".dependencies.glutin-winit]
version = "0.5"
optional = true
default-features = false
features = ["egl", "wgl"]

[target."cfg(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"))".dependencies.accesskit]
version = "0.22"
optional = true

[target."cfg(not(target_arch = \"wasm32\"))".dependencies.accesskit_winit]
version = "0.30"
optional = true
default-features = false
